name: Tofu Guacamole
recipeIngredient: Black pepper and cayenne to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the avocados.
2. Add in the remaining ingredients (onions, tofu, salt, garlic, cumin, lemon juice, tomato) and mash together until well combined.
3. Do not include parsley at this stage.
4. Leave the avocado seed in the dip to prevent it from turning brown.
5. Cover the bowl and chill the dip for 2 hours.
6. Serve cold.
